2606.31432.title: Clinically Structured Rank-Gated LoRA for Cross-Benchmark Medical Question Answering
2606.31432.paper_summary: Medical multiple-choice question answering requires parameter-efficient adaptation across heterogeneous knowledge domains and reasoning operations. A medication question, a diagnostic decision, a public-health item, and a nursing-action item may require different low-rank updates, while some recall items should preserve the base model's representation with only mild adapter intervention. We propose BiRG-LoRA, a single-adapter rank-gated LoRA method for medical question answering. BiRG-LoRA keeps one LoRA module per target layer but makes its rank dimension input-conditioned: for each question, a biaxial gate combines hidden semantic evidence with specialty/profession priors, clinical-operation priors, and their interaction to select a sparse top-$k$ subset of rank atoms. A scalar injection coefficient further controls the strength of the selected adapter update. Under a matched Qwen3-8B CMB-source protocol, BiRG-LoRA achieves the highest four-benchmark macro-average accuracy among trainable PEFT baselines and matched routing controls: 69.31% averaged over CMB, CMExam, MedQA, and MedMCQA. It improves over MoELoRA by 0.89 percentage points while using 28.1% fewer trainable parameters; a paired, benchmark-stratified bootstrap over final predictions gives a 95% confidence interval of [0.42, 1.37] for this macro-average gain. Basic controls show that BiRG-LoRA also improves over vanilla LoRA r16 and active-rank-matched LoRA r4 by 0.83 macro points, and an evaluation-time weak-axis perturbation check suggests that performance is not brittle to moderate tag noise. The results support a bounded claim: clinically structured rank allocation improves cross-benchmark medical QA under a matched single-seed protocol, while training-seed variance remains future work.
2606.31432.paper_summary_zh: 醫療多選題回答需要在異質知識領域和推理操作之間進行參數高效的適應。一個藥物問題、一個診斷決策、一個公共衛生項目和一個護理行動項目可能需要不同的低秩更新，而某些回憶項目應該僅在輕微的適配器干預下保留基礎模型的表示。我們提出了BiRG-LoRA，一種針對醫療問題回答的單適配器秩閘LoRA方法。BiRG-LoRA在每個目標層保持一個LoRA模塊，但使其秩維度依賴於輸入：對於每個問題，一個雙軸閘將隱藏的語義證據與專業/職業先驗、臨床操作先驗及其交互結合，以選擇稀疏的前$k$個秩原子。一個標量注入係數進一步控制所選適配器更新的強度。在匹配的Qwen3-8B CMB源協議下，BiRG-LoRA在可訓練的PEFT基線和匹配的路由控制中實現了最高的四基準宏平均準確率：在CMB、CMExam、MedQA和MedMCQA上平均為69.31%。它比MoELoRA提高了0.89個百分點，同時使用了28.1%更少的可訓練參數；對最終預測進行的配對基準分層自助法給出了這一宏平均增益的95%置信區間[0.42, 1.37]。基本控制顯示，BiRG-LoRA也比原始LoRA r16和主動秩匹配的LoRA r4提高了0.83個宏點，評估時的弱軸擾動檢查表明性能對中等標籤噪聲不脆弱。結果支持一個有限的主張：臨床結構化的秩分配在匹配的單種子協議下改善了跨基準的醫療QA，而訓練種子變異性仍然是未來的工作。
2606.31432.author: Yining Huang et.al.
